subcodes.first_line: This is a Book from Our presence unto him who hath sought the countenance of his Lord, the Mighty, the All-Praised, and who hath migrated with Him from Zawrá [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من لدنا الی الذی اراد وجه ربه العزیز الحمید و هاجر معه من الزورآء
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @prayer for nearness to God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
